song.title: Having Seen the World's Fair Beauty
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Having seen the world’s fair beauty, Now I would be blind once more, Lest I lose the loving Presence And Delight I knew before.
[C] Chorus Having seen the world’s fair beauty, Now I would be blind once more, Lest I lose Thy loving Presence And Delight I knew before.
[V2] 2) Dawn and sunset, star and moonlight, I can see in paradise, But while here on earth His mercy For my blindness will suffice.
[V3] 3) I no more would be delivered From my thorn, but look for grace, While within the veil His glory Shineth brightly on my face.
[V4] 4)In the deep dark night, His beauty I by faith, not sight, may trace; He was ridiculed and hated, Yet I see His glorious face.
[V5] 5) Sun and moonlight far surpassing, Clouds and Milky Way o’er-spread, Is the glory all transcending Shining from His thorn-crowned head.
